description: Telegram Android cache.db messages are extracted into ExtractionResult
steps: Create a minimal Telegram cache.db fixture (messages, dialogs, users tables)
Assert at least one Chat with at least one Message is returned
Assert Message.sender_jid is populated from users table

description: Telegram media messages (photos, documents, voice) produce MessageContent::Media
steps: Insert a Telegram message row with media_type != 0 and file_path set
Assert MessageContent::Media is produced with correct mime_type

description: Telegram calls from tgcalls table are extracted into CallRecord list
steps: Insert a row into Telegram calls table
Assert ExtractionResult.calls has at least one entry
